description: catwalk has come up with yet another scrumptious pair of off-duty sandals for women. Crafted with an eye for high fashion and a feel for superior comfort, this pair is a closet essential. Style this with a feminine top and skinny jeans or skirts. Upper Synthetic leather and elasticated straps for durability and style Soft toe separator Synthetic leather and denim footbed Brand embossed on the footbed Outsole TPR outsole with textured grooves for grip and traction Raised flower shaped heel and branding embossed on the forefoot Sandal care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
